description_long: This house features a highly unconventional and artistic design, with flowing, organic white and blue forms wrapping around a more traditional wooden structure. The roof is primarily gabled and metallic, with several dormer windows and a mix of straight and curved lines. The exterior walls combine natural wood paneling with bold, sculptural elements that create a dynamic, almost whimsical appearance. There is a prominent staircase leading up to an elevated entryway, and the house sits on a grassy base, suggesting a suburban or park-like setting. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some grouped in rows and others set individually. The overall impression is of a modern, avant-garde residence that blends traditional and contemporary architectural elements.
description: A modern, artistic house with flowing white and blue sculptural forms wrapping around a wooden structure, featuring a gabled metal roof and asymmetrical windows.
description_view_0: Side view showing the dramatic white and blue sculptural forms, wooden siding, and a prominent staircase leading to the entryway.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the gabled roof with dormer windows, wooden facade, and the curved entry platform.
description_view_2: Rear/side view displaying the organic white forms enveloping the house and a mix of window placements on the wooden wall.
description_view_3: Back view with a smaller extension, flat white surfaces, and a partial view of the main roof and blue sculptural elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with dormer and individual windows
attribute_entryway_design: Elevated entry with curved steps, no porch, and a sculptural overhang
